objective: Validate the user-accepted Regular05 safe103_crop98 candidate across all five NUS Regular gate clips without per-clip retuning.

accepted_dependency.accepted_candidate: delay90 bounded LP + safe103 constant scale + crop98 postprocess

allowed: safe103 constant-scale viewport policy with explicit FOV trade-off
crop98 postprocess as a separate output stage
forbidden: postprocess crop98 as already integrated into MMAPI/VPI/NVENC
per-clip tuning hidden as one general producer

must_freeze: viewport policy: safe103 fixed scale derived from Regular05 median scale * 1.03 unless explicitly updated before the run
success_criteria: postprocess black_border_p95 remains below 0.01 for each clip
review videos are copied to the categorized review tree
clips are classified as accepted, conditional, or reject after human review

validated_results.failure_attribution: Stronger local crop95/crop92 did not fix regular_gate01 or regular_gate02, so the failure is not a simple postprocess crop strength issue. Continuing would require per-clip tuning or a different strategy.

stop_reasons: safe103_crop98 visibly fails on multiple Regular clips
per-clip tuning would be required to pass
Jetson SSH or MMAPI runtime blocker

next_route.decision: Stop local patching of this same global-matrix + crop strategy. Use knowledge recovery or internal AI guidance for FOV-safe crop, border fill, causal smoothing, or scene-specific strategy.
next_route.recommended_action: Generate internal AI prompt if the user wants to continue toward a general Regular producer.
